expectations.evidence: neural_net.tex exists in outputs directory with 94 lines of valid LaTeX code
Lines 6-12 define colors with \definecolor commands using Anthropic hex values: slate (141413), ivory (FAF9F5), clay (D97757), sky (6A9BCC), olive (788C5D), gray400 (B0AEA5), gray700 (3D3D3A)

Lines 55-70 use explicit y-offset calculations: input layer \ypos={(\i - 2.5) * 
odesep}, hidden layer \ypos={(\i - 3.5) * 
odesep}, output layer \ypos={(\i - 1.5) * 
odesep}. Each layer is independently centered around y=0, not chained with 'below=' positioning
